Zapateria hirsuta is a type of palm tree that belongs to the genus Zapateria. The classification of Zapateria hirsuta is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the class Liliopsida. The binomial nomenclature of Zapateria hirsuta is used to identify this species among other plants in the same genus.
